Get in touch

Connecting Markets.
Unlocking Opportunities.

Zyron is a Brazilian international commodity broker and sourcing company — connecting buyers and suppliers across global agricultural and food markets.

Get in touch

How it works

Simple. Transparent. Effective.

We bridge the gap between buyers and suppliers — from first contact to closed deal.

01
Understanding your needs
We start by listening — mapping your requirements, volumes, quality specs, and target markets, whether you are buying or selling.
02
Finding the right match
Using our international network, we identify and vet the most suitable counterparts — buyers or suppliers aligned with your expectations.
03
Facilitating the deal
We support communication, negotiations, and documentation — staying involved until the deal is successfully closed.

What we trade

Our commodities

We operate across a wide range of agricultural and food commodities, supporting efficient trade flows between producing and consuming markets.

Grains & Sweeteners
Corn & Sugar
Yellow Corn · Raw & Refined Sugar
Connecting mills and producers with global buyers across food and feed industries worldwide.
Superfoods & Specialty
Açaí, Cacao & Coffee
Açaí Pulp & Powder · Fine Cacao · Arabica & Robusta Coffee
Premium superfoods and specialty products tailored to international health and gourmet markets.
Animal Proteins
Poultry & Beef
Chicken · Beef & Derivatives
Connecting reliable exporters with qualified international buyers across multiple markets.
Hard & Other Commodities
Beyond the list.
We also work with hard and other commodities on a case-by-case basis. Get in touch to discuss your specific needs — we are always open to new opportunities.

Why Zyron

From field to global markets.

Rooted in Brazil's commodity sector, Zyron operates globally — connecting opportunities through international sourcing, trade expertise, and strategic market relationships.

01
Strategic Approach
Every operation is structured from the start — considering commercial, logistical, and regulatory requirements to ensure safe and efficient execution.
02
Quality & Origin Focus
We work closely with producers and suppliers, prioritizing quality, traceability, and consistency — building partnerships that last beyond a single deal.
03
Reliable Execution
We stay involved throughout the entire operation — coordinating parties, managing risk, and ensuring predictability from negotiation to delivery.
04
Global Understanding
With international experience across multiple markets, we bridge cultural and commercial gaps — turning complex negotiations into straightforward deals.

Global Markets

Global trade feeds the world.

Agricultural commodities move continuously across international markets, connecting supply with demand on a global scale. From producers to distributors and industries, international sourcing has become a key pillar of modern food systems. No market is fully self-sufficient — global trade is fundamental to supply chains, food security, and economic development.

$2T+
Global agricultural trade value annually
190+
Countries actively trading agricultural commodities
$165B
Brazil's agribusiness exports in 2024
900M
People fed by Brazilian agricultural production

Brazil — the world's largest net food exporter
